text.title: code-review-process Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for code-review-process as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent pre-fills test checkboxes as checked when no test artifacts exist to verify them.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reviewers see a completed checklist and assume tests were run. A PR approved on the basis of a false checklist reaches production with untested code.
